name: organtic
description: The AI-native organization. 25 experts from idea to launch. Strategy pipeline (validate > build > launch) + execution plugins (craft, document, present, studio).

metadata.description: Organtic - AI-native organization plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: validate
plugins.description: Validate business ideas with 3 AI experts: Value Mapper, Business Modeler, Experiment Designer

plugins.name: build
plugins.description: Product vision and build with 5 AI experts: Product Strategist, Brand Strategist, Growth Designer, Spec Writer, Product Designer

plugins.name: launch
plugins.description: Go-to-market with 7 AI experts: Offer Designer, Copywriter, Funnel Architect, Growth Auditor, Media Planner, SEO Strategist, AI Search Optimizer

plugins.name: craft
plugins.description: Build landing pages, scaffold MVPs, design components, and test products with 4 AI builder agents

plugins.name: document
plugins.description: Generate professional business documents: plans, pitch decks, SOPs, case studies with 2 AI writer agents

plugins.name: present
plugins.description: Create professional slide presentations from strategy outputs with Marp markdown to PDF/PPTX

plugins.name: studio
plugins.description: Visual production studio: product demos, social clips, branded content with 3 AI producer agents

plugins.name: pipeline
plugins.description: Pipeline controller that chains validate > build > launch plugins using Stop hook loop pattern
